title: Unity Software Stock Forecast & Predictions 2026
text: One Year Price Target: $37.41 (implied 88% upside from recent trading levels). Price Target Range: The range of analyst price targets spans from $16 (very conservative) to $59 (very bullish). The median/average price target is approximately $34-37, suggesting moderate to strong upside. Analyst Positioning: Out of 26-35 analysts covering Unity, the majority (60%+) have Buy or Overweight ratings, with the remainder holding or underweight. Notable analyst firms with constructive views include Morgan Stanley, Wedbush, Jefferies, and Needham. Bull Case: Vector platform success driving exponential ad business growth, subscription revenue expansion from Create Solutions, path to GAAP profitability by Q4 2026, and potential M&A targets as a strategic platform company. Bear Case: Competitive pressure from AppLovin and other ad tech platforms, execution risk on profitability targets, macro headwinds in gaming and advertising, and legacy IronSource integration challenges. Technical Setup: Stock has rebounded from 2024 lows but remains below 2021 peaks, suggesting room for multiple expansion if operational targets are met. Volatility: Beta of approximately 2.0 indicates high sensitivity to market movements.
